title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 525.090 - Claimants may interplead
text:
525.090.  Claimants may interplead. — Any person claiming property, money, effects or credits attached in the hands of a garnishee, may interplead in the cause, as provided by law in attachment cases; but no judgment shall be rendered against the garnishee in whose hands the same may be, until the interplea shall be determined.
(RSMo 1939 § 1568) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1404; 1919 § 1854; 1909 § 2421
